ddls:
CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the process image */,
  "pid" INTEGER /* Process ID */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number */,
  "mem_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage of the process in KB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the process (e.g., Unknown, Running, Sleeping) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user running the process */,
  "cpu_time" TEXT /* Total CPU time used by the process */,
  "parent_process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent process */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the process */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the process */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of process (e.g., System, User) */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Is the process critical to the system? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_session_name FOREIGN KEY ("session_name") REFERENCES sessions ("session_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Developer, IT Support) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Start, Stop, Update) */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the process */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_history_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Error, Warning, Info) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., Admin, Read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_dependencies" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "dependent_process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent process */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Parent-Child, Sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id", "dependent_process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being indexed */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term used to create the index */,
  "index_value" TEXT /* Value of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Insert, Update, Delete) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
